zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Fenwick於1401年12月25日出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克時，他的父親Alan Fenwick42歲，母親Margaret Percy34歲。他於1427年與Lady Joan Leigh在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。他於1415年住在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德分維其可。他去世於1473年9月18日在英國越可爾可利加姆享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Fenwick于1401年12月25日出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克时，他的父亲Alan Fenwick42岁，母亲Margaret Percy34岁。他于1427年与Lady Joan Leigh在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德阿恩維克结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。他于1415年住在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德分維其可。他去世于1473年9月18日在英国越可爾可利加姆享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fenwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern) and Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Northumberland or from one in Yorkshire, all of which are so named from Old English fenn ‘marsh, fen’ + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’. There is also a place in Ayrshire, Scotland, which has the same name and origin. This last is the source of at least some early examples of the surname: Nicholaus Fynwyk was provost of Ayr in 1313, and Reginald de Fynwyk or Fynvyk appears as bailie and alderman of the same burgh in 1387 and 1401. The name is usually pronounced ‘Fennick’.

History: The name was brought over from England by several forebears, including George Fenwick (1603–56/7), a colonist from Brinkburn, Northumberland. He was one of the group of lords and gentlemen to whom the earl of Warwick, president of the Council for New England, granted forty leagues of territory west of the Narragansett River. George took up residence with his family at Saybrook, CT, in 1639. John Fenwick of Bynfield, Berkshire, England, established himself at Salem, NJ, in June 1675, the first Quaker settlement on the Delaware.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Fenwick was born on 25 December 1401, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, his father, Alan Fenwick, was 42 and his mother, Margaret Percy, was 34. He married Lady Joan Leigh in 1427, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. He lived in Fenwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom in 1415. He died on 18 September 1473, in Collingham, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Fenwick est né le 25 décembre 1401, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Alan Fenwick, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margaret Percy, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan Leigh en 1427, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Il a vécu à Fenwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1415. Il est décédé le 18 septembre 1473, à Collingham, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Fenwick am 25. Dezember 1401 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan Fenwick 42 und seine Mutter Margaret Percy 34. Er hat 1427 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Lady Joan Leigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. 1415 hat er in Fenwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 18. September 1473 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Collingham, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Fenwick è nato il il 25 dicembre 1401 nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Alan Fenwick, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Percy, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joan Leigh nel 1427, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Vissuto a Fenwick, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1415. Morì il 18 settembre 1473, nel Collingham, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Fenwickが1401年12月25日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで生まれた時，父Alan Fenwickは42歳，母Margaret Percyは34歳であった。1427年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックでLady Joan Leighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年にはイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドフエンウィックに住んでいた。彼は1473年9月18日にイギリスヨークシュアイアコリンガムで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Fenwick(이)가 1401년 12월 25일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan Fenwick(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Percy(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 Lady Joan Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1415년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 펜윅에서 살았다. 그는 1473년 9월 18일 영국 요르크실르 콜링함에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.25 December 1401–18 Sep 1473: 25 de dezembro de 1401–18 de setembro de 1473
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Fenwick nasceu em 25 de dezembro de 1401, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan Fenwick, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Percy, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joan Leigh em 1427, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Fenwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1415. Ele faleceu em 18 de setembro de 1473, em Collingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Fenwick родился 25 декабря 1401 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Alan Fenwick было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Percy, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan Leigh в 1427 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности фенвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в 1415 году. Он умер 18 сентября 1473 г. в местности коллингхам, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.25 December 1401–18 Sep 1473: 25 de diciembre de 1401–18 de septiembre de 1473
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Fenwick nació el 25 de diciembre de 1401, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Alan Fenwick, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margaret Percy, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Lady Joan Leigh en 1427, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Vivió en Fenwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1415. Murió el 18 de septiembre de 1473, en Collingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
